Vendors

Booths for electronics manufacturers, robotics teams, component shops, education projects, and FAET/KAI student startups.

Standard booth

Table + 2 seats, power, Wi-Fi.

Demo booth

More room for interactive demos and equipment.

Student booth

Discounted terms for FAET student teams and clubs.
